scripts.dev: npm run content:check && ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro dev --force
scripts.build: npm run content:check && ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro build --force
scripts.check: npm run content:check && ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro sync --force && ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro check
scripts.test:e2e: playwright test tests/e2e/routes.spec.ts tests/e2e/navigation.spec.ts tests/e2e/empty-states.spec.ts tests/e2e/i18n.spec.ts tests/e2e/korean-layout.spec.ts tests/e2e/final-qa.spec.ts
